root.name: change_all_text_slide_27_center_aligned
root.description: Evaluates if all text on slide 27 is center-aligned, and only slide 27 is affected.

children.name: all_text_on_slide_27_is_center_aligned
children.description: Checks that every text element on slide 27 is center-aligned.

children.name: verify_text_center_alignment_slide_27
children.description: Verifies all textboxes/shapes on slide 27 have center alignment.

children.name: no_unintended_changes_to_other_slides
children.description: Checks that no unintended changes were made to slides other than 27.

children.name: verify_only_slide_27_modified
children.description: Verifies only slide 27 is modified (content, layout, elements, text, etc.).

children.name: no_extraneous_formatting_or_effects_slide_27
children.description: Checks no other formatting, animations, or transitions were added/removed on slide 27.

children.name: verify_no_new_animations_on_slide_27
children.description: Verifies no new or removed animations on slide 27.

children.name: verify_no_new_transitions_on_slide_27
children.description: Verifies no new or removed transitions on slide 27.

children.name: verify_no_other_formatting_changes_slide_27
children.description: Checks no extraneous formatting changes (font, color, etc.) except alignment on slide 27.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score():
    # Focus on major formatting changes. We'll compare text properties other than alignment.
    from pptx import Presentation
    import difflib
    try:
        prs_orig = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
        prs_mod = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
        slide_orig = None
        slide_mod = None
        for idx, s in enumerate(prs_orig.slides):
            if idx == 26: slide_orig = s
        for idx, s in enumerate(prs_mod.slides):
            if idx == 26: slide_mod = s
        if slide_orig is None or slide_mod is None:
            return "Slide 27 missing in original or modified.", 1.0  # Don't penalize if can't compare
        changes = 0
        total = 0
        for sh_o, sh_m in zip(slide_orig.shapes, slide_mod.shapes):
            if not (sh_o.has_text_frame and sh_m.has_text_frame):
                continue
            para_o = sh_o.text_frame.paragraphs[0]
            para_m = sh_m.text_frame.paragraphs[0]
            # Check font size, color, bold, italic, underline, font name
            run_o = para_o.runs[0] if para_o.runs else None
            run_m = para_m.runs[0] if para_m.runs else None
            if not (run_o and run_m):
                continue
            # Compare properties except alignment
            diff = False
            props = [
                'font.size','font.bold','font.italic','font.underline','font.color.rgb','font.name'
            ]
            if run_o.font.size != run_m.font.size: diff = True
            if run_o.font.bold != run_m.font.bold: diff = True
            if run_o.font.italic != run_m.font.italic: diff = True
            if run_o.font.underline != run_m.font.underline: diff = True
            if (run_o.font.color and run_m.font.color and run_o.font.color.rgb != run_m.font.color.rgb): diff = True
            if run_o.font.name != run_m.font.name: diff = True
            if diff: changes += 1
            total += 1
        if total == 0:
            return "No comparable text runs found on slide 27.", 1.0
        if changes == 0:
            return "No extraneous formatting changes on slide 27.", 1.0
        else:
            score = 1.0 - (changes/total)
            return f"{changes} of {total} text elements have new formatting (not alignment)", score
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Formatting check error: {e}", 1.0

metadata.task: Change all text on slide 27 to be center-aligned
